sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53936" key="katadoupe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταδουπέω</orth>, <sense id="n53936.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall with a loud heavy sound, crash</tr_>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 2</tns>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τυπεὶς κατέδουπε κεραυνῷ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.637</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
